'''kongajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cablelike|cablelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cablelike|cablelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kongajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongajithi|kongajithi]] || [[word:kongajiji|kongajiji]] || [[word:kongajishi|kongajishi]] || [[word:kongajiki|kongajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongajuthuthu|kongajuthuthu]] || [[word:kongajujuju|kongajujuju]] || [[word:kongajushushu|kongajushushu]] || [[word:kongajukuku|kongajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongajuthu|kongajuthu]] || [[word:kongajuju|kongajuju]] || [[word:kongajushu|kongajushu]] || [[word:kongajuku|kongajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongajufthuf|kongajufthuf]] || [[word:kongajufjuf|kongajufjuf]] || [[word:kongajufshuf|kongajufshuf]] || [[word:kongajufkuf|kongajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongajethe|kongajethe]] || [[word:kongajeje|kongajeje]] || [[word:kongajeshe|kongajeshe]] || [[word:kongajeke|kongajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongajothotho|kongajothotho]] || [[word:kongajojojo|kongajojojo]] || [[word:kongajoshosho|kongajoshosho]] || [[word:kongajokoko|kongajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongajotho|kongajotho]] || [[word:kongajojo|kongajojo]] || [[word:kongajosho|kongajosho]] || [[word:kongajoko|kongajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongajofthof|kongajofthof]] || [[word:kongajofjof|kongajofjof]] || [[word:kongajofshof|kongajofshof]] || [[word:kongajofkof|kongajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongajïfthïf|kongajïfthïf]] || [[word:kongajïfjïf|kongajïfjïf]] || [[word:kongajïfshïf|kongajïfshïf]] || [[word:kongajïfkïf|kongajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongajïfthïfthïf|kongajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kongajïfjïfjïf|kongajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kongajïfshïfshïf|kongajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kongajïfkïfkïf|kongajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongajïfthïf|kongajïfthïf]] || [[word:kongajïfjïf|kongajïfjïf]] || [[word:kongajïfshïf|kongajïfshïf]] || [[word:kongajïfkïf|kongajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongajïfthïf|kongajïfthïf]] || [[word:kongajïfjïf|kongajïfjïf]] || [[word:kongajïfshïf|kongajïfshïf]] || [[word:kongajïfkïf|kongajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongajæthæ|kongajæthæ]] || [[word:kongajæjæ|kongajæjæ]] || [[word:kongajæshæ|kongajæshæ]] || [[word:kongajækæ|kongajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongajathatha|kongajathatha]] || [[word:kongajajaja|kongajajaja]] || [[word:kongajashasha|kongajashasha]] || [[word:kongajakaka|kongajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongajatha|kongajatha]] || [[word:kongajaja|kongajaja]] || [[word:kongajasha|kongajasha]] || [[word:kongajaka|kongajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongajafthaf|kongajafthaf]] || [[word:kongajafjaf|kongajafjaf]] || [[word:kongajafshaf|kongajafshaf]] || [[word:kongajafkaf|kongajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kongajasha|kongajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongajshësha|kongajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongajrosha|kongajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongajmusha|kongajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongajyasha|kongajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongajnkshësha|gokongajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongajnkrosha|gokongajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongajnkmusha|gokongajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongajnkyasha|gokongajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kongangajasha|kongangajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongangajshësha|kongangajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongangajrosha|kongangajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongangajmusha|kongangajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongangajyasha|kongangajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongangajnkshësha|gokongangajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongangajnkrosha|gokongangajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongangajnkmusha|gokongangajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongangajnkyasha|gokongangajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kengæjasha|kengæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kengæjshësha|kengæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kengæjrosha|kengæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kengæjmusha|kengæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kengæjyasha|kengæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokengæjnkshësha|gokengæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokengæjnkrosha|gokengæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokengæjnkmusha|gokengæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokengæjnkyasha|gokengæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kongfajasha|kongfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongfajshësha|kongfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongfajrosha|kongfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongfajmusha|kongfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongfajyasha|kongfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongfajnkshësha|gokongfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongfajnkrosha|gokongfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongfajnkmusha|gokongfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongfajnkyasha|gokongfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
